Name: [Category Name]
Slug: [url-friendly-slug]
Icon: [Emoji icon]
Color: [Color name: blue, green, red, purple, orange, pink, yellow, indigo, teal, gray]
Description: [Brief description for category overview]
Featured: [true/false - whether to feature prominently]
Sort_Order: [Number for ordering categories]
Keywords: [Comma-separated list of related keywords/topics]

---

[Extended description content goes here. This will appear on the category page explaining what type of content users can expect to find in this category.

Include:
- What topics are covered
- Why this category is important
- What types of articles to expect
- Target audience for this content
- Key trends or themes in this space]

EXAMPLE:
================

Name: Creator Economy
Slug: creator-economy
Icon: 💰
Color: green
Description: Business of content creation and monetization strategies
Featured: true
Sort_Order: 1
Keywords: monetization, sponsorships, brand deals, creator funds, revenue streams, platform monetization, subscription models

---

The Creator Economy represents the class of businesses built by over 50 million independent content creators, curators, and community builders including social media influencers, bloggers, and videographers, plus the software and finance tools designed to help them with growth and monetization.

This category covers everything from platform monetization features and creator funds to brand partnerships and alternative revenue streams. We track the latest developments in how creators are building sustainable businesses and the tools that support them.

Key areas of coverage include:
- Platform monetization updates (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.)
- Creator funds and grant programs
- Brand partnership trends and rates
- Alternative monetization strategies (subscriptions, merchandise, courses)
- Creator-focused startups and tools
- Economic analysis and market trends
- Platform policy changes affecting creator income

Whether you're a creator looking to grow your business or a brand wanting to understand the creator landscape, this category provides essential insights into the rapidly evolving creator economy. Our coverage helps you stay ahead of monetization trends and understand the business side of content creation.

Recent developments we've covered include the rise of creator funds, the growth of newsletter platforms, the emergence of virtual tip jars, and the evolution of brand partnership marketplaces.
